sentences.target: Die Wolke sieht aus wie ein Hund.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈvɔlkə ziːt aʊs viː aɪn hʊnt/

translations.de: Die Wolke sieht aus wie ein Hund.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈvɔlkə ziːt aʊs viː aɪn hʊnt/
translations.en: The cloud looks like a dog.
translations.fr: Le nuage ressemble à un chien.
translations.zh-Hans: 那朵云看起来像一只狗。
translations.vi: Đám mây trông như một con chó.
translations.nl: De wolk lijkt op een hond.
translations.hu: A felhő úgy néz ki, mint egy kutya.
translations.nb: Skyen ser ut som en hund.
translations.sv: Molnet ser ut som en hund.
translations.ja: 雲が犬みたいに見える。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Wolke' (subject of the clause).
Common noun; nominative feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); part of the separable verb 'aussehen' with the particle 'aus'; forms the predicate.
Separable verbal particle of 'aussehen' linked to 'sieht'; contributes the meaning 'to look/appear'.
Comparative subordinator introducing a comparison phrase; links the predicate to the comparative complement.
Indefinite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the predicate nominal 'Hund' in the comparison.
Common noun; nominative masculine singular; predicate nominal of the comparative phrase ('wie ein Hund').

sentences.target: Ich fotografiere die Wolke über dem Haus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç foˌtoɡʁaˈfiːʁə diː ˈvɔlkə ˈyːbɐ deːm haʊs/

translations.de: Ich fotografiere die Wolke über dem Haus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç foˌtoɡʁaˈfiːʁə diː ˈvɔlkə ˈyːbɐ deːm haʊs/
translations.en: I’m taking a photo of the cloud over the house.
translations.es: Estoy tomando una foto de la nube sobre la casa.
translations.fr: Je prends une photo du nuage au-dessus de la maison.
translations.it: Sto fotografando la nuvola sopra la casa.
translations.ko: 집 위에 있는 구름을 찍고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在拍房子上方的那朵云。
translations.yue: 我喺度影屋上面嗰朵雲。
translations.pt: Estou tirando uma foto da nuvem sobre a casa.
translations.he: אני מצלם את הענן מעל הבית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chụp đám mây trên ngôi nhà.
translations.nl: Ik maak een foto van de wolk boven het huis.
translations.hi: मैं घर के ऊपर वाले बादल की तस्वीर खींच रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φωτογραφίζω το σύννεφο πάνω από το σπίτι.
translations.nb: Jeg tar et bilde av skyen over huset.
translations.id: Aku sedang memotret awan di atas rumah.
translations.sv: Jag tar en bild av molnet över huset.
translations.ro: Fac o poză norului de deasupra casei.
translations.da: Jeg tager et billede af skyen over huset.
translations.ja: 家の上の雲を撮っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); predicate of the clause.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object 'Wolke'.
Common noun; accusative feminine singular; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition; governs dative here (static location); introduces the prepositional phrase indicating location.
Definite article; dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Haus' governed by 'über' (locative).
Common noun; dative neuter singular; object of the preposition 'über' within the locative PP.

sentences.target: Über uns zieht eine dunkle Wolke.

translations.de: Über uns zieht eine dunkle Wolke.
translations.en: A dark cloud is moving over us.
translations.es: Una nube oscura pasa por encima de nosotros.
translations.fr: Un nuage sombre passe au-dessus de nous.
translations.it: Una nuvola scura passa sopra di noi.
translations.ko: 우리 머리 위로 검은 구름이 지나가고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 一朵乌云正从我们头顶掠过。
translations.yue: 一片黑雲正喺我哋頭頂上面飄過。
translations.pt: Uma nuvem escura está passando sobre nós.
translations.vi: Một đám mây đen đang trôi qua trên đầu chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Een donkere wolk trekt over ons heen.
translations.hi: हमारे ऊपर एक काला बादल गुजर रहा है.
translations.pl: Ciemna chmura przesuwa się nad nami.
translations.el: Ένα σκοτεινό σύννεφο περνάει από πάνω μας.
translations.nb: En mørk sky beveger seg over oss.
translations.id: Awan gelap bergerak di atas kami.
translations.sv: Ett mörkt moln rör sig över oss.
translations.ro: Un nor întunecat trece pe deasupra noastră.
translations.cs: Temný mrak se přesouvá nad námi.
translations.da: En mørk sky bevæger sig hen over os.
translations.ja: 私たちの上を黒い雲が動いている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative here (static location); starts a fronted prepositional phrase.
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, dative (form syncretic with accusative); object of 'Über' in the fronted PP.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); predicate; inversion due to fronted PP.
Indefinite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Attributive adjective; nominative feminine singular (mixed inflection -e after 'eine'); modifier of 'Wolke'.
Common noun; nominative feminine singular; head of the subject NP.

sentences.target: Die Sonne verschwindet hinter der Wolke.

translations.de: Die Sonne verschwindet hinter der Wolke.
translations.en: The sun disappears behind the cloud.
translations.es: El sol desaparece detrás de la nube.
translations.fr: Le soleil disparaît derrière le nuage.
translations.it: Il sole scompare dietro la nuvola.
translations.pt: O sol desaparece atrás da nuvem.
translations.vi: Mặt trời biến mất sau đám mây.
translations.nl: De zon verdwijnt achter de wolk.
translations.hu: A Nap eltűnik a felhő mögött.
translations.hi: सूरज बादल के पीछे गायब हो रहा है.
translations.el: Ο ήλιος εξαφανίζεται πίσω από το σύννεφο.
translations.ja: 太陽が雲の後ろに隠れていく。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject 'Sonne'.
Common noun; nominative feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); predicate of the clause.
Preposition; governs dative here (static location); introduces a locative PP.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Wolke' governed by 'hinter' (locative).
Common noun; dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'hinter' within the locative PP.
